page: Amazon Web Services i7i.2xlarge is an x86_64 storage-optimized server powered by an 8-vCPU Intel Xeon 8559C processor with 4 physical cores and hyper-threading. It features 64 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz, providing 8 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 1875 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and runs on the AWS Nitro hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-threaded performance, with Geekbench single-core and single-threaded gzip compression scores placing in the top 10% tier. Text processing is also highly efficient, scoring in the top 10% on Geekbench. Multi-core performance, including stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core, aligns with average tier expectations. Memory bandwidth is strong, with Passmark memory scores in the top 25% and large block read/write speeds reaching 62.81 GB/sec and 58.56 GB/sec respectively.

While the server demonstrates strong capabilities in single-threaded tasks and small-model LLM text generation, it exhibits a performance tradeoff in larger workloads, such as medium-model LLM text generation, which falls into the bottom 25%. The combination of high-speed DDR5 memory, dedicated Intel Xeon cores with AVX-512 and AMX extensions, and substantial local NVMe SSD storage makes this server suitable for database operations, data compression tasks, and localized storage-heavy applications.
description: Amazon Web Services i7i.2xlarge is an x86_64 storage-optimized server featuring 8 vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8559C processor, 64 GB of DDR5 memory, and 1875 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Operating on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps. Benchmarks show top-tier single-core performance, with Geekbench single-core and single-threaded gzip compression scoring in the top 10%. Memory performance is strong, supported by DDR5 RAM running at 6 GHz. However, a tradeoff exists in multi-threaded scaling and larger workloads, as seen in the weak text generation speeds for 7B LLM models. This server is suited for database operations, text processing, and storage-intensive workloads requiring rapid local read/write capabilities.

tagline: A storage-optimized server combining high-speed DDR5 memory and local NVMe SSD capacity for data-intensive and single-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 8 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8559C with dedicated allocation
1875 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
64 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz
Top-tier single-core CPU and text processing performance
Suited for database operations, data compression, and local storage workloads
